commonSeoMistakesBanner.alt: Infographic showing common SEO mistakes including poor content, weak keywords, bad backlinks, and website speed.
commonSeoMistakesBanner.title: Common SEO Mistakes That Reduce Search Engine Rankings
commonSeoMistakesBanner.description: Educational infographic highlighting the most common SEO mistakes that prevent websites from ranking, including poor keyword research, low-quality content, weak backlinks, and slow page speed.
commonSeoMistakesBanner.caption: Avoid common SEO mistakes that reduce rankings, traffic, and business growth.

technicalAuditStepImage.alt: Google local search ranking showing a business in the first position with improved visibility, reviews, and customer trust.
technicalAuditStepImage.title: First Position in Google Local Search Results and Visibility
technicalAuditStepImage.description: Illustration of a business achieving the first position in Google local search results, highlighting improved online visibility, customer trust, reviews, and higher conversion opportunities through effective Local SEO strategies.
technicalAuditStepImage.caption: Rank higher in Google local search and attract more qualified customers with proven Local SEO strategies.

onPageOptimizationStepImage.alt: Google Business Profile ranking dashboard showing increased phone calls generated from higher Google Map Pack visibility.
onPageOptimizationStepImage.title: Google Map Pack Rankings That Generate More Customer Calls
onPageOptimizationStepImage.description: Visual representation of Google Business Profile performance demonstrating how improved Map Pack rankings increase phone calls, customer inquiries, and qualified local leads for service-based businesses.
onPageOptimizationStepImage.caption: Better Map Pack visibility means more phone calls, qualified leads, and local customers.

offPageStrategyStepImage.alt: Google search results highlighting businesses attracting high purchase intent traffic that converts into qualified leads.
offPageStrategyStepImage.title: High Purchase Intent Traffic Through Local SEO Strategy
offPageStrategyStepImage.description: Illustration showing how Local SEO attracts visitors with strong buying intent by targeting commercial keywords, optimizing search visibility, and converting searches into qualified business inquiries.
offPageStrategyStepImage.caption: Reach customers actively searching for your services and ready to take action.

analyticsReportingStepImage.alt: SEO performance dashboard showing increased conversions, revenue growth, and measurable business results from organic search.
analyticsReportingStepImage.title: SEO Performance Growth That Converts Into More Revenue
analyticsReportingStepImage.description: Analytics dashboard illustrating how improved search visibility leads to higher conversions, increased revenue, and measurable business growth through strategic SEO and digital marketing campaigns.
analyticsReportingStepImage.caption: Measure SEO success with real growth in traffic, leads, conversions, and business revenue.

seoWebsiteAuditImage.alt: SEO website audit dashboard showing technical SEO, content quality, page speed, crawl issues, and optimization scores.
seoWebsiteAuditImage.title: Comprehensive SEO Website Audit and Performance Review
seoWebsiteAuditImage.description: Comprehensive SEO audit dashboard evaluating technical SEO, content quality, site structure, mobile usability, page speed, and crawl issues to identify opportunities that improve search performance and user experience.
seoWebsiteAuditImage.caption: Identify technical and content issues with a complete SEO audit that improves website performance.

keywordResearchImage.alt: SEO keyword research dashboard showing search volume, keyword difficulty, trends, and search intent analysis.
keywordResearchImage.title: Keyword Research and Search Intent Analysis for Better SEO
keywordResearchImage.description: Visual showing comprehensive keyword research with search volume, keyword difficulty, search intent, and trend analysis to identify high-value opportunities that improve rankings and drive qualified organic traffic.
keywordResearchImage.caption: Target the right keywords with search intent analysis to attract qualified visitors and increase conversions.

onPageOptimizationImage.alt: On-page SEO dashboard highlighting content optimization, meta tags, internal linking, and image optimization.
onPageOptimizationImage.title: On-Page SEO Optimization for Higher Search Rankings
onPageOptimizationImage.description: Illustration showing essential on-page SEO elements including optimized content, meta titles, descriptions, internal links, and image optimization that improve search rankings, user experience, and organic visibility.
onPageOptimizationImage.caption: Optimize every page with better content, metadata, internal links, and images for stronger rankings.

technicalSeoImage.alt: Technical SEO illustration showing crawlability, indexability, site speed, mobile optimization, and HTTPS security.
technicalSeoImage.title: Technical SEO Optimization for Better Crawlability and Indexing
technicalSeoImage.description: Illustration highlighting technical SEO best practices including crawlability, indexability, mobile responsiveness, HTTPS security, and page speed optimization to improve search engine accessibility and rankings.
technicalSeoImage.caption: Build a strong technical SEO foundation that helps search engines crawl, index, and rank your website effectively.

localSeoMapPackImage.alt: Google Maps showing a business ranked in the top local results with increased visibility and customer engagement.
localSeoMapPackImage.title: Local SEO and Google Map Pack Optimization Strategy
localSeoMapPackImage.description: Illustration demonstrating Local SEO and Google Map Pack optimization that helps businesses rank higher in local searches, improve online visibility, generate more calls, and attract nearby customers.
localSeoMapPackImage.caption: Improve your Google Map rankings and attract more nearby customers searching for your services.

contentDevelopmentImage.alt: SEO content strategy featuring service pages, location pages, and FAQ articles that build search authority and rankings.
contentDevelopmentImage.title: SEO Content Development and Authority Building Strategy
contentDevelopmentImage.description: Illustration showing how strategic service pages, location pages, FAQs, and authoritative content improve search rankings, establish trust, and increase long-term organic visibility.
contentDevelopmentImage.caption: Build authority with strategic content that earns trust and improves organic search rankings.

offPageSeoImage.alt: Diagram illustrating off-page SEO through trusted backlinks, local citations, authority websites, and business mentions.
offPageSeoImage.title: Off-Page SEO Link Acquisition and Authority Building
offPageSeoImage.description: Illustration explaining off-page SEO using high-quality backlinks, local citations, business directories, news mentions, and authority websites to improve domain authority, search rankings, and online credibility.
offPageSeoImage.caption: Earn trusted backlinks and citations that strengthen your authority and improve search engine rankings.

askEngineOptimizationImage.alt: AI-generated search answer highlighting trusted content optimized for Answer Engine Optimization and search visibility.
askEngineOptimizationImage.title: Ask Engine Optimization for AI Search Visibility Results
askEngineOptimizationImage.description: Illustration showing Answer Engine Optimization (AEO), where trusted and structured content helps businesses appear in AI-generated search results, increasing visibility, credibility, and customer engagement.
askEngineOptimizationImage.caption: Optimize your content for AI-powered search engines and trusted answer experiences.

generativeEngineOptimizationImage.alt: AI assistant recommending a local business through Generative Engine Optimization with trusted and authoritative content.
generativeEngineOptimizationImage.title: Generative Engine Optimization for AI Search Results
generativeEngineOptimizationImage.description: Illustration demonstrating Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), helping businesses become trusted sources that AI assistants recommend in conversational and generative search experiences.
generativeEngineOptimizationImage.caption: Increase your visibility by becoming a trusted source for AI-generated search recommendations.

googleBusinessProfileManagementImage.alt: Google Business Profile dashboard showing reviews, posts, updates, and profile optimization for better local visibility.
googleBusinessProfileManagementImage.title: Google Business Profile Management for Local Business Growth
googleBusinessProfileManagementImage.description: Illustration of a fully optimized Google Business Profile featuring customer reviews, regular posts, photo updates, and profile management that improves local search visibility, trust, and customer engagement.
googleBusinessProfileManagementImage.caption: Keep your Google Business Profile active to increase local visibility, trust, and customer inquiries.

performanceTrackingReportingImage.alt: SEO reporting dashboard displaying keyword rankings, website traffic, conversions, and Google Business Profile performance.
performanceTrackingReportingImage.title: SEO Performance Tracking and Monthly Reporting Dashboard
performanceTrackingReportingImage.description: Analytics dashboard displaying website traffic, keyword rankings, Google Business Profile metrics, conversions, and monthly SEO performance reports to measure campaign success and guide future optimization strategies.
performanceTrackingReportingImage.caption: Track SEO performance with detailed reports covering rankings, traffic, leads, and business growth.
